asset.title: App Variance Fill
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: Excellent workflow preview demonstrating automated variance calculation via collaborative agents with real-time trace updates.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly shows agents locking cells, calculating variances, and updating the sheet.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire flow from unpopulated cells to active execution and final merged state.

visualDesign.evidence: Polished dark-mode UI with clean layout, though trace text is slightly compact.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with NodeRoom's spreadsheet, agent collaboration, and trace log paradigm.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes and trace logs.

legibility.evidence: Main spreadsheet is highly legible; trace log text is readable but small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and automation engineers.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts agent locking mechanisms and trace logs without overpromising.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet UI with Q2/Q3 financial data

defects.observed: Trace log text is quite small and may be hard to read on smaller mobile screens.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the font size of the trace log panel if possible.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom agents collaborate to automatically calculate and merge financial variance analysis directly into your spreadsheet.
